entity.description: The father of Azareel, the “captain” of the tribe of Dan (1 Chr. 27:22).

nodes.label: Jeroham
nodes.description: The father of Azareel, the “captain” of the tribe of Dan (1 Chr. 27:22).

verses.text: Of Dan, Azareel the son of Jeroham. These were the princes of the tribes of Israel.
